test_vectors.desc: CSRRW x1, mstatus: read mstatus, csr_result_e1_value_o returns mstatus value, csr_result_e1_write_o=1
CSRRS x1, mstatus: atomic read-and-set of mstatus, CSR read data on value_o output
CSRRC x1, mstatus: atomic read-and-clear of mstatus, CSR read data on value_o output
CSRRWI x1, mstatus: immediate-form CSR read, csr_result_e1_write_o=1, value on csr_result_e1_value_o
ECALL from M-mode: generates exception cause 11 via csrfile, branch target updated by regfile
EBREAK: generates breakpoint exception cause 3, exception PC forwarded to regfile
MRET: branch_csr_request_o=1, branch target from MEPC, ifence_o=1, privilege from MPP
SRET: branch_csr_request_o=1, branch target from SEPC, ifence_o=1, privilege from SPP
WFI: no exception generated, no branch request, opcode consumed without action
FENCE instruction: ifence_o=1, no other CSR action
External interrupt asserted: interrupt forwarded to csrfile, take_interrupt_o depends on regfile state
External interrupt with interrupt_inhibit: effective interrupt masked, take_interrupt_o=0
Writeback exception (bit 5 set) has priority: forwarded to regfile even during valid opcode
Opcode invalid signal high: decode skipped, no CSR read, no branch, no exception generated
SATP change via writeback: mmu_satp_o updated, mmu_flush_o asserted when satp differs from prev
MXR and SUM bits reflected in mmu control outputs via mstatus readback in same cycle
No valid opcode: all pulse outputs at zero, no CSR read, no branch, no exception
CSRRW x1, mstatus with PC set: csr_result_e1_value_o=mstatus, csr_result_e1_wdata_o=mstatus, write=1
